items.title: From Detection to Action: Using LLM Agents for Fault-Tolerant Control
items.abstract: We propose an agentic Large Language Model (LLM) framework for active Fault-Tolerant Control (FTC) that transforms fault detection outputs into constraint-aware recovery actions grounded in plant-specific knowledge. The approach couples (i) a multi-agent workflow that decomposes operator duties into monitoring, planning, action synthesis, simulation, validation, and reprompting; (ii) a Digital Process Plant Twin (DPPT) that exposes plant data, models, and a simulation service for pre-execution testing; and (iii) a Graph Retrieval-Augmented Generation (Graph RAG) layer built on the CPSMod ontology, which organizes plant knowledge (structure, function, hybrid dynamics, control context, and fault semantics) into a graph that supports relation-aware, multi-hop retrieval for the agents. Corrective actions are generated as minimal-risk state-machine recovery paths and corresponding discrete commands or continuous setpoint adaptations, then validated deterministically against interlocks, envelopes, and dynamic feasibility before any actuation. If no acceptable plan is found within a bounded time window, control is handed to a safety fallback. The framework is evaluated in simulation on two representative benchmarks: a discrete batch Mixing Module and a Continuous Stirred-Tank Reactor (CSTR) under closed-loop PID regulation. Results with lightweight LLMs (GPT-4o-mini and GPT-4.1-mini) show that semantically grounded agents can derive valid recovery decisions within latency budgets compatible with the respective process dynamics, demonstrating a practical pathway from detection to validated corrective action across both discrete and continuous FTC tasks.
items.llm_evidence_en: LLM agents for fault-tolerant control, enhancing safety of autonomous systems
items.llm_evidence_cn: LLM智能体用于容错控制，增强自主系统安全性
items.llm_evidence: LLM智能体用于容错控制，增强自主系统安全性
items.canonical_evidence: LLM智能体用于容错控制，增强自主系统安全性
items.llm_tldr_en: An agentic LLM framework for fault-tolerant control that transforms fault detections into constraint-aware recovery actions, improving system safety.
items.llm_tldr_cn: 本文提出一个基于LLM智能体的容错控制框架，将故障检测输出转化为约束感知的恢复动作。框架结合多智能体工作流、数字孪生和知识图谱，通过仿真验证后再执行，确保在工业控制中可靠运行。该方法提升了自主系统的安全性和鲁棒性。
items.llm_tldr: 本文提出一个基于LLM智能体的容错控制框架，将故障检测输出转化为约束感知的恢复动作。框架结合多智能体工作流、数字孪生和知识图谱，通过仿真验证后再执行，确保在工业控制中可靠运行。该方法提升了自主系统的安全性和鲁棒性。
